{{Quote|Go speak with Lieutenant Karenna Dunnels and make sure we have enough neural boosters to help protect against the Mummers' toxins. Lt. Dunnels is an RSF scientist.|[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Mercious Bragg|Bragg]]|<ref name="SWG:RtLD" />}}
'''Karenna Dunnels''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and [[Science officer/Legends|science officer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She who worked in the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and had associations with [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]], [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Gregar Typho]], [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja Naberrie]], [[Harriet Brunser]], [[Sundria Khartoor]], and [[Mercious Bragg]].<ref name="SWG:RtLD" /> At some point In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a [[Terrorist attack in Theed|terrorist attack]] took place in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. Lieutenant Dunnels was then tasked with creating a batch of [[Stimulant/Legends|neural boosters]] for the security force and hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to collect [[xharnoh plant]] roots and [[nightspider]] venom sacs for her, vital ingredients for the boosters.<ref name="SWG:HLDwitmNB">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Help Lt. Dunnels with ingredients to make Neural Boosters|Naboo}}</ref> The boosters were used during the RSF [[Raid on the Mummer bunker|raid]] on the [[Mummers|Mummer]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]].<ref name="SWG:BTttT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Bring Terror to the Terrorists|Naboo}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Karenna Dunnels appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:RtLD" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Karenna Dunnels was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]", a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
